debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α✝
α : Type
n m : ℕ
inst✝¹ : OracleComp.SampleableType α
inst✝ : DecidableEq α
⊢ Pr[⊥ |
      Nat.recAux (pure (Matrix.of ![]))
        (fun n ihn => do
          let top ← OracleComp.uniformSample (Vector α m) (OracleComp.instSampleableTypeVector α m inst✝¹)
          let bot ← ihn
          pure (Fin.cons top.get bot))
        n] =
    0

failed_attempts:
induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      simp_all [probFailure_seq, probFailure_pure]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Matrix.ext_iff, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Matrix.ext_iff, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      simp_all [probFailure_seq, probFailure_pure, probFailure_ite]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop

induction n with
      | zero =>
        intro m
        -- Base case: when n = 0, the matrix is empty and there is no failure
        simp [Matrix, Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
          (try simp_all [SampleableType, ProbComp])
        <;>
          (try norm_num)
        <;>
          (try rfl)
      | succ n ih =>
        intro m
        -- Inductive step: assume the statement holds for n, prove for n + 1
        simp_all [Matrix, Fin.ext_iff, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
        <;>
          (try simp_all [SampleableType, ProbComp])
        <;>
          (try norm_num)
        <;>
          (try rfl)
        <;>
          (try
            {
              -- Use the fact that the probability of failure is 0 for the previous step
              simp_all [ProbComp, SampleableType]
              <;>
                (try norm_num)
              <;>
                (try rfl)
            })
        <;>
          (try
            {
              -- Use the fact that the probability of failure is 0 for the previous step
              simp_all [ProbComp, SampleableType]
              <;>
                (try norm_num)
              <;>
                (try rfl)
            })
    -- Apply the general result to the specific n and m
    have h₂ : [⊥ | $ᵗ (Matrix (Fin n) (Fin m) α)] = 0 := h₁ n m
    exact h₂
  exact h

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      simp [ih, probFailure_seq, probFailure_pure, probFailure_ite]
      <;>
      (try decide)
      <;>
      (try {
        rfl
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Matrix, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ]
        <;>
        aesop
      })

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      simp_all [Matrix, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, probFailure_seq]
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { simp_all [Matrix, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, probFailure_seq] }) <;>
      (try { norm_num }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try { simp_all [Matrix, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, probFailure_seq] }) <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { norm_num }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try { simp_all [Matrix, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, probFailure_seq] }) <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { norm_num }) <;>
      (try { aesop })

simp_all [probFailure_seq, probFailure_pure, probFailure_ite]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Nat.recAux])
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try field_simp)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, Fin.head_cons, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Vector.ofFn_val, Vector.get])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.mem_univ])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_univ])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_singleton])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_empty])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_univ])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_singleton])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Finset.card_empty])

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      simp_all [ProbComp.bind, ProbComp.uniformSample, ProbComp.support, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [ProbComp.bind, ProbComp.uniformSample, ProbComp.support, Set.mem_setOf_eq])
      <;>
      (try
        {
          norm_num
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Matrix, Vector]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Fin.cons, Fin.tail]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Vector.get]
          <;>
          aesop
        })

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih =>
      simp_all [bind, pure, do_eq_bind, probFailure_congr, probFailure_pure, probFailure_fst, probFailure_snd]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_ite]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_seq]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_pure]
      <;> try norm_num
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_congr]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_ite]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_seq]
      <;> try simp_all [probFailure_pure]
      <;> try norm_num
      <;> try aesop

mem_support_selectElem x := by induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp only [bind_pure_comp, Nat.rec_zero, support_pure, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    apply Matrix.ext
    rintro i j
    exact False.elim (IsEmpty.false i)
  | succ p ih =>
    simp at *
    stop
    use Vector.ofFn (x 0), (Fin.tail x); constructor
    simp [ih]
    have : (Vector.ofFn (x 0)).get = x 0 := by
      ext i
      simp [Vector.get]
    simp [Fin.cons_self_tail, this]
  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp
    rfl
  | succ m ih =>
    sorry
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    stop
    induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      simp [ih, probFailure_seq, probFailure_pure, probFailure_ite]
      <;> try simp_all [SampleableType.probFailure_selectElem]
      <;> try norm_num
      <;> try aesop
